mapper.insert: INSERT INTO comments (post_id, user_id, content, parent_id, reply_to_user_id) VALUES (#{postId}, #{userId}, #{content}, #{parentId}, #{replyToUserId})
mapper.update: UPDATE comments SET status = 0 WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT c.id, c.post_id AS postId, c.user_id AS userId, c.content, c.like_count AS likeCount, c.created_at AS createdAt, u.username, u.avatar_url AS avatarUrl, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comments r WHERE r.parent_id = c.id AND r.status = 1) AS replyCount FROM comments c LEFT JOIN users u ON c.user_id = u.id WHERE c.post_id = #{postId} AND c.parent_id IS NULL AND c.status = 1 ORDER BY c.created_at DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comments WHERE post_id = #{postId} AND parent_id IS NULL AND status = 1

SELECT c.id, c.post_id AS postId, c.user_id AS userId, c.parent_id AS parentId, c.reply_to_user_id AS replyToUserId, c.content, c.like_count AS likeCount, c.created_at AS createdAt, u.username, u.avatar_url AS avatarUrl, ru.username AS replyToUsername FROM comments c LEFT JOIN users u ON c.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN users ru ON c.reply_to_user_id = ru.id WHERE c.post_id = #{postId} AND c.parent_id = #{parentId} AND c.status = 1 ORDER BY c.created_at ASC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
mapper.update: UPDATE posts SET comment_count = comment_count + 1 WHERE id = #{postId}
UPDATE posts SET comment_count = comment_count - 1 WHERE id = #{postId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO likes (user_id, target_type, target_id) VALUES (#{userId}, #{targetType}, #{commentId})
mapper.update: UPDATE comments SET like_count = like_count + 1 WHERE id = #{commentId}
UPDATE comments SET like_count = like_count - 1 WHERE id = #{commentId}
mapper.select: SELECT c.id, c.content, c.status, c.like_count AS likeCount, c.parent_id AS parentId, c.reply_to_user_id AS replyToUserId, c.created_at AS createdAt, c.user_id AS userId, u.username, u.avatar_url AS avatarUrl, c.post_id AS postId, p.title AS postTitle FROM comments c JOIN users u ON u.id = c.user_id LEFT JOIN posts p ON p.id = c.post_id WHERE c.id = #{id}
SELECT user_id FROM comments WHERE id = #{commentId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comments WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 1
